dealSummary: Paris-based insurtech startup Alan raised €400 million at a €5.5 billion valuation in a round led by Prosus.
Fintech platform developer Airwallex secured a $320 million Series H led by Addition at an $11 billion valuation.
Muon Space, which specializes in satellite constellation networks, is raising a $250 million round, Axios reported.
Trase, a startup developing an enterprise AI operating system, raised a $107 million seed round led by Arch Venture Partners.
Scaled Cognition, an enterprise AI model lab, received a $100 million Series A led by Khosla Ventures.
Runpod, which operates an AI developer cloud system, received a $100 million investment from Summit Partners.
Biotech startup Lycia Therapeutics, which focuses on autoimmune and inflammatory diseases, secured a $75 million Series D led by Janus Henderson and Balyasny Asset Management.
Wealth management platform developer Arca raised $64 million across its seed round led by Venrock and Series A led by General Catalyst.
leadInvestors: Venrock, Series A led by General Catalyst

dealSummary: Autoimmune-disease-focused Oblenio Bio secured a $62 million Series B led by Pfizer Ventures.
AI payroll and employee management software developer Warp raised a $60 million Series B led by Battery Ventures.
Toronto-based Float, which provides a system for financial workflows, secured a C$85 million ($59.8 million) Series C led by Inovia Capital.
Patronus AI, the developer of simulations and testing environments for AI agents, raised a $50 million Series B led by Greenfield Partners.
Hera, the developer of a senior care management platform, raised a $27 million Series A led by Bain Capital Ventures.
Almetra, a German developer of an AI-based process analytics platform for factories, raised a $19 million Series A led by Blisce.
